water.name: Sportsman's Park Pond
aliases: Bob Perchetti Memorial Sportsman's Park Pond

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Sportsman's Park Pond (Nye County): Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours: hours park is open to public use.

sources.title: Sportsman's Park/Rye Patch Pond — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Community pond, Nye County, Southern region. Regularly stocked with rainbow trout.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.humanSummary: Sportsman's Park Pond is open to fishing year-round.
Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (species composition unrestricted) at Sportsman's Park Pond.
regulations.verbatimText: Limits — Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: Fishing is limited to the hours the surrounding park is open to public use.

regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is permitted only during the hours the park (Bob Perchetti Memorial Sportsman's Park) is open to public use.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Hours park is open to public use.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
